title: Semantics And Units
content:
## Semantic Type

The default semantic types available are;

    Custom semantic types can be created by Developers and are not listed here.

    When creating or updating Data Streams, use the Name to define the Semantic Type.

| Semantic Type   | Semantic Name   |
|:----------------------|:---------------------|
| Acceleration          | acceleration         |
| Angle                 | angle                |
| Angular Acceleration  | angular_acceleration |
| Angular Velocity      | angular_velocity     |
| Area                  | area                 |
| Capacitance           | capacitance          |
| Compressibility       | compressibility      |
| Current               | current              |
| Data Rate             | data_rate            |
| Data Size             | data_size            |
| Density               | density              |
| Distance              | distance             |
| Pumpcard              | pumpcard             |
| Electric Charge       | electric_charge      |
| Energy                | energy               |
| Force                 | force                |
| Frequency             | frequency            |
| Humidity              | humidity             |
| Illuminance           | illuminance          |
| Inductance            | inductance           |
| Latitude              | latitude             |
| Length                | length               |
| Linear Density        | linear_density       |
| Longitude             | longitude            |
| Luminance             | luminance            |
| Luminosity            | luminosity           |
| Luminous Flux         | luminous_flux        |
| Luminous Intensity    | luminous_intensity   |
| Magnetic Flux         | magnetic_flux        |
| Magnetic Induction    | magnetic_induction   |
| Mass                  | mass                 |
| Mass Flow Rate        | mass_flow_rate       |
| None                  | none                 |
| Permeability          | permeability         |
| Power                 | power                |
| Pressure              | pressure             |
| Relative Humidity     | relative_humidity    |
| Resistance            | resistance           |
| Sound Pressure        | sound_pressure       |
| State                 | state                |
| Temperature           | temperature          |
| Thrust                | thrust               |
| Time                  | time                 |
| TimeSpan              | timespan             |
| Torque                | torque               |
| Velocity              | velocity             |
| Viscosity             | viscosity            |
| Voltage               | voltage              |
| Volume                | volume               |
| Volume Flow Rate      | volume_flow_rate     |

## Units

The default units available are;

    Custom units can be created by Developers and are not listed here.

    When creating or updating Data Streams, use the Name to define the Unit.

### Acceleration

| Unit Title | Unit Name | Unit Symbol |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Centimetre per Second Squared | centimetre_per_second_squared | cm/s² |
| G-Force | g_force | g |
| Metre per Second Squared | metre_per_second_squared | m/s² |

### Angle

| Unit Title | Unit Name | Unit Symbol |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Degree of Arc | degree_of_arc | ° |
| Minute of Arc | minute_of_arc |  |
| Radian | radian | rad |
| Second of Arc | second_of_arc | ' |
| Turn | turn | rev |

### Angular Acceleration

| Unit Title | Unit Name | Unit Symbol |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Radian per Second Squared | radian_per_second_squared | rad/s² |

### Angular Velocity

| Unit Title | Unit Name | Unit Symbol |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Degree per Second | degree_per_second | °/s |
| Radian per Second | radian_per_second | rad/s |
| Revolution per Minute | revolution_per_minute | rpm |
| Revolution per Second | revolution_per_second | rps |

| Unit Title | Unit Name | Unit Symbol |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Acre | acre | ac |

| Square Inch | square_inch | in² |
| Square Kilometre | square_kilometre | km² |
| Square Metre | square_metre | m² |
| Square Millimetre | square_millimetre | mm² |
